subject: binary/command name
truth: Replace the command 'cme' with 'nxc' (also 'NetExec'/'netexec').
quote: Binary/command renamed `cme` -> `nxc` (also `NetExec`/`netexec`)

subject: database tool
truth: Replace the database tool 'cmedb' with 'nxcdb'.
quote: db tool `cmedb` -> `nxcdb`

subject: home folder
truth: Replace the home folder '~/.cme' with '~/.nxc'.
quote: home folder `~/.cme` -> `~/.nxc`

subject: config file
truth: Replace the config file 'cme.conf' with 'nxc.conf'.
quote: config `cme.conf` -> `nxc.conf`

subject: environment variable
truth: Replace the environment variable 'CME_PATH' with 'NXC_PATH'.
quote: env var `CME_PATH` -> `NXC_PATH`

subject: pip/pipx package name
truth: Replace the pip/pipx package 'crackmapexec' with 'netexec'.
quote: pip/pipx package `crackmapexec` -> `netexec`

subject: `--jitter` option
new: reworked to enable throttling of authentications
truth: The `--jitter` option has been reworked to throttle authentications instead of its previous behaviour.
quote: The old `--jitter` option got reworked to enable throttling of authentications.

from_fact: reworked to enable throttling of authentications

subject: Powershell obfuscation and AMSI bypasses
old: obfuscation and AMSI bypasses were default
truth: Obfuscation and AMSI bypasses in PowerShell execution are no longer enabled by default; they must be explicitly opted into.
quote: Obfuscation and Amsi bypasses have also been set to non-default, as they were often flagged even by AVs.

from_fact: obfuscation and amsi bypasses were default

subject: NFS file download/upload flags
old: old semantics of file download and upload flags
new: new semantics of file download and upload flags
truth: The semantics of NFS file download and upload flags have changed; check the new flag usage documentation before using them.
quote: With this update, the semantics of the file download and upload flags have been changed. Don't forget to check at the new flag usage.

from_fact: old semantics of file download and upload flags
new semantics of file download and upload flags

subject: command name
truth: Stop using 'netexec' as the command; use 'nxc' instead.
quote:
NetExec
netexec
nxc

subject: configuration directory
truth: Stop relying on the default ~/.nxc folder; set the NXC_PATH environment variable to configure the home folder.
quote: The default folder that will be created is ~/.nxc. If you would like to change the destination folder set the environment variable NXC_PATH to the target folder.

subject: default thread count
truth: The default number of concurrent threads is now 100.
quote: -t THREADS            set how many concurrent threads to use (default: 100)

subject: timeout default
truth: The default timeout per thread is None (no timeout), which may cause threads to hang indefinitely.
quote: --timeout TIMEOUT     max timeout in seconds of each thread (default: None)

subject: jitter default
truth: The default jitter between connections is None (no random delay), which may cause aggressive scanning.
quote: --jitter INTERVAL     sets a random delay between each connection (default: None)

subject: NetExec database storage directory
truth: Stop looking in '~/.cme/workspaces' and use '~/.nxc/workspaces' instead for database storage.
quote: All workspaces and their relative databases are stored in `~/.nxc/workspaces`

subject: BloodHound collector compatibility
truth: Stop using the legacy BloodHound collector zip; nxc now expects BloodHound CE zip format by default. To keep using the legacy collector, change the config setting.
quote: If you want to swap to the legacy collector, change the config setting.

subject: impacket dependency branch
truth: The impacket dependency has been switched to the Pennyw0rth fork; existing code relying on the original impacket branch may break or behave differently.
quote: Switch impacket branch to Pennyw0rth fork

subject: LDAP source dependency
truth: The LDAP source has been switched to a fixed version; existing code depending on the old LDAP source may break.
quote: Switch LDAP source to fixed version

subject: LDAP checker (built-in checks for LDAP signing and channelBinding)
truth: The LDAP checker module has been removed; built-in checks for LDAP signing and channelBinding requirements are now shown in the host banner instead.
quote: Built-in checks for LDAP signing and channelBinding requirements in the host banner!

subject: nxc path / config directory
truth: nxc now supports XDG Base Directory for its path/config; the old hardcoded path is no longer used, which may break scripts that rely on the old config location.
quote: Refactoring nxc path and adding support for XDG Base Directory

subject: multiple hosts option
truth: Stop using the multiple hosts option; it has been removed entirely.
quote: Removing the horrible multiple hosts option by @mpgn in https://github.com/Pennyw0rth/NetExec/pull/804

subject: efsr_spray module
truth: Stop using the efsr_spray module; it has been removed and superseded by using EPM map on the EFS interface.
quote: Remove efsr_spray module, superceded by simply using EPM map on the EFS interface

subject: --debug and --verbose flags
truth: Using both --debug and --verbose together now causes an error; you must use only one.
quote: Make --debug and --verbose mutually exclusive by @NeffIsBack in https://github.com/Pennyw0rth/NetExec/pull/1000

subject: MSSQL SAM/LSA dump
old: SAM/LSA dump via MSSQL required local admin
new: SAM/LSA dump via MSSQL no longer requires local admin
truth: Stop requiring local admin for MSSQL SAM/LSA dump; the --sam/--lsa flags now work without local admin privileges.
quote: Fix sam/lsa dump if user is not local admin

from_fact: sam/lsa dump via mssql required local admin
sam/lsa dump via mssql no longer requires local admin

subject: SMB admin check
old: SMB protocol always performed admin check with SC_MANAGER_ALL_ACCESS
new: SMB protocol now has --no-admin-check flag to skip the admin check
truth: Stop relying on the admin check always running; use --no-admin-check to disable the SC_MANAGER_ALL_ACCESS check that was previously mandatory.
quote: --no-admin-check flag for smb to disable the "admin check" with SC_MANAGER_ALL_ACCESS which is done by default

from_fact: smb protocol always performed admin check with sc_manager_all_access
smb protocol now has --no-admin-check flag to skip the admin check

subject: WinRM database hostname
new: WinRM database stores FQDN instead of NETBIOS name
truth: Stop expecting NETBIOS names in the WinRM database; the stored hostname is now the FQDN.
quote: Insert FQDN instead of NETBIOS name into winrm db

from_fact: winrm database stores fqdn instead of netbios name

subject: Python 3.8 and 3.9 support
truth: Drop support for Python 3.8 and 3.9; you must use Python 3.10 or later.
quote: Drop support for Python 3.8 and 3.9

subject: SMB from LDAP protocol
truth: Stop using SMB within the LDAP protocol; the LDAP protocol now uses plain LDAP only.
quote: No more SMB in the LDAP protocol, just plain LDAP ðŸŽ‰

subject: ldapConnection variable
truth: Stop using `ldapConnection`; rename it to `ldap_connection` in your code.
quote: Rename ldapConnection to the new ldap_connection var #508 #4767762 - Fix Modules

subject: default SMB connection protocol
truth: The default SMB connection protocol has been switched from SMBv1 to SMBv3.
quote: switch default conn from smbv1 to smbv3

subject: cert-pem CLI flag
truth: The flag --cert-pem has been renamed to --pem-cert to match the PFX syntax convention.
quote: Swap cert-pem to pem-cert to match pfx syntax

subject: secretsdump default technique (--lsa / --sam)
old: default secretsdump technique (impacket-based, writes to disk)
new: regsecretsdump technique (registry queries, no disk writes)
truth: The default for --lsa and --sam is now the regsecretsdump technique; to use the old method you must explicitly specify it (e.g. --lsa secdump).
quote: Introducing `regsecretsdump` which dump `--lsa` and `--sam` just with registry queries, without writing to disk

from_fact: default secretsdump technique (impacket-based, writes to disk)
regsecretsdump technique (registry queries, no disk writes)

subject: firefox module
truth: Stop using the firefox module; use --dpapi instead which includes Firefox support.
quote: Remove firefox module in favour of --dpapi which includes firefox by @NeffIsBack

subject: LAPS login mechanism
new: restructured LAPS login to fix login issues
truth: The LAPS login mechanism has been restructured, which may break existing LAPS login workflows.
quote: Restructure how laps login works to fix login issues

from_fact: restructured laps login to fix login issues

subject: MSSQL --no-smb option
truth: Stop using --no-smb with MSSQL; SMB is no longer needed and the flag has been removed.
quote: No more SMB needed (also remove --no-smb)

subject: pyreadline dependency
truth: Stop using pyreadline; it has been removed as it causes errors in nxcdb.
quote: Remove pyreadline as it causes errors in nxcdb

subject: Write without delete permission behaviour
old: Write without delete was not displayed as write access
new: Write without delete is now displayed as write access
truth: Write without delete will now be displayed as write access, which may change permission interpretation in existing scripts.
quote: Write without delete will now be displayed as write access

from_fact: write without delete was not displayed as write access
write without delete is now displayed as write access
associative: write no delete shown as write

subject: WinRM no longer requires SMB for NTLM info
old: WinRM required SMB to gather NTLM info
new: WinRM no longer needs SMB to gather NTLM info
truth: WinRM no longer needs SMB to gather NTLM info; any workflow relying on SMB being used alongside WinRM will break.
quote: No longer need SMB to gather NTLM info

from_fact: winrm required smb to gather ntlm info
winrm no longer needs smb to gather ntlm info

subject: MAQ.py module file
truth: Stop using MAQ.py; the module file has been renamed to maq.py (lowercase).
quote: rename MAQ.py to maq.py

subject: oscrypto dependency
truth: Stop using oscrypto; the library has been removed and swapped back to fortra/impacket.
quote: Remove oscrypto and swap back to fortra/impacket

subject: logging level for normal output
truth: Normal output that was previously logged at DEBUG level is now logged at INFO level, so it will appear in non-debug logging.
quote: Logging in DEBUG mode: change normal output from DEBUG to INFO

subject: jitter option
old: jitter option that randomly inserted delays
truth: The old jitter option has been changed to a throttle authentications option that randomly inserts sleeps before authenticating.
quote:
Change jitter option to throttle authentications by @NeffIsBack in https://github.com/Pennyw0rth/NetExec/pull/291

  * Changed the old jitter function to randomly insert sleeps before authenticating

from_fact: jitter option that randomly inserted delays

subject: PowerShell obfuscation default
old: obfuscation enabled by default for PowerShell
truth: PowerShell obfuscation is now turned off by default.
quote: turn off obfuscation by default for powershell, since defender picks it up easily

from_fact: obfuscation enabled by default for powershell

subject: AMSI bypass default
new: AMSI bypass turned off by default
truth: AMSI bypass is now turned off by default (users can still pass in their own).
quote: turn off amsi-bypass by default, since it was an incredibly old signatured bypass (users can still pass in their own)

from_fact: amsi bypass turned off by default

subject: FTP --ls flag
new: default now lists current directory (.) instead of previous behavior
truth: FTP --ls flag now defaults to listing the current directory (.) instead of whatever it listed before; if an argument is provided it lists that sub-directory.
quote: Modified the --ls flag to allow for listing the current directory and sub-directories. Default now lists .. If an argument is provided, it will list the provided sub-directory

from_fact: default now lists current directory (.) instead of previous behavior

subject: SSH paramiko private key discovery
old: paramiko automatically discovers private keys in ~/.ssh/
new: paramiko auto-discovery of private keys in ~/.ssh/ is disabled
truth: SSH protocol now disables paramiko's automatic discovery of private keys in ~/.ssh/, which previously caused paramiko exceptions.
quote: paramiko always discovery private keys in ~/.ssh/, that will make paramiko exception, disable it.

from_fact: paramiko automatically discovers private keys in ~/.ssh/
paramiko auto-discovery of private keys in ~/.ssh/ is disabled

subject: FTP class name
truth: Stop using the class name 'Ftp' (capital F); the FTP class was accidentally renamed to 'Ftp' and has been fixed back to its original name.
quote: Fix ftp class name (got changed to "Ftp" by accident)

subject: connection.py - self.port attribute
truth: Stop accessing port via self.args.port; port is now redirected to self.port directly.
quote: connection.py and protocol: Redirect self.args.port to self.port

subject: connection.py - IPv6 detection function
truth: The gethost_addinfo function now uses AF_UNSPEC instead of trying AF_INET6 then AF_INET, and IPv4 is preferred when target is dual stack.
quote: connection.py: rewrite gethost_addinfo function, don't need try to detect ipv6 anymore, just use AF_UNSPEC instead AF_INET6, AF_INET

subject: opsec flag
truth: Stop using the --opsec flag; it has been removed entirely.
quote: deprecation: remove the horrible opsec flag by @mpgn in https://github.com/Pennyw0rth/NetExec/pull/788

subject: pywerview dependency
truth: Stop relying on pywerview being available as a dependency; it has been removed.
quote: Remove pywerview dependency by @mpgn in https://github.com/Pennyw0rth/NetExec/pull/579

subject: ssh_agent usage
truth: SSH agent usage is now disabled; code relying on ssh_agent being available will break.
quote: disable use of ssh_agent
